_meta.note: WAIVED February 18, 2026 — no longer on roster

tree.name: Nikola Durisic
tree.narrative: **Nikola Durisic** came to Atlanta in a three-team draft-night deal in 2024 — the Hawks sent **A.J. Griffin** to Houston and got the Serbian wing from Miami. The experiment didn't last; Durisic was waived in February 2026.
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: ATL traded A.J. Griffin to HOU, ATL traded cash to MIA; MIA traded Nikola Djurisic to ATL; HOU traded Pelle Larsson to MIA.
tree.note: Serbian wing. Acquired via 3-team trade on draft night 2024. Waived Feb 18, 2026.

assetsGivenUp.name: A.J. Griffin
assetsGivenUp.narrative: **A.J. Griffin** was Atlanta's own #16 pick in the 2022 draft out of Duke. The wing was shipped to Houston in a three-team trade that brought **Nikola Durisic** to the Hawks.
assetsGivenUp.note: Hawks' own #16 pick in 2022 draft. Duke wing, sent to HOU in 3-team trade.
